title: koeleria cristata var. brevifolia
intro: Koeleria cristata var. brevifolia, also known as June grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata var. brevifolia include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
